zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Argentine於大約1350年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾時，她的父親John de Argentine33歲，母親Margaret Darcy39歲。她於1368年與Sir Richard Merton在英國艾可斯普爾 布普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年在英國貝德福爾盧頓享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Argentine于大约1350年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾时，她的父亲John de Argentine33岁，母亲Margaret Darcy39岁。她于1368年与Sir Richard Merton在英国艾可斯普爾 布普斯亞德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1414年在英国貝德福爾盧頓享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Argentine was born about 1350, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Argentine, was 33 and her mother, Margaret Darcy, was 39. She married Sir Richard Merton in 1368, in Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1414, in Luton, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Argentine est née environ 1350, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Argentine, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Darcy, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Merton en 1368, à Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1414, à Luton, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Argentine um 1350 in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Argentine 33 und ihre Mutter Margaret Darcy 39. Sie hat 1368 in Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, England Sir Richard Merton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1414 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Luton, Bedfordshire, England.

Lei sposato Sir Richard Merton nel 1368, nel Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1414, nel Luton, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Argentineが約1350年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Argentineは33歳，母Margaret Darcyは39歳であった。1368年にイギリスエセックススティープル ブンプステアドでSir Richard Mertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1414年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアルトンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Argentine(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Argentine(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Darcy(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 에세스 스티플 버프스테아드에서 Sir Richard Merton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 영국 베드퍼드실르 루턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Argentine nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Argentine, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Darcy, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Merton em 1368, em Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1414, em Luton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Argentine родилась около 1350 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Argentine было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Darcy, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Merton в 1368 г. в местности стипл бумпстид, эссекс, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1414 г. в местности лутон, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.
